description: Excel double-subtracts this meter: it appears as a subtracted −term on row 26 (B310 formula) AND on row 30 (B314 formula). Ontology enforces one-parent-per-meter and attached it to B314 (shorter-formula-wins). B310 therefore over-counts vs Excel by Δ(B313.KV1_VMM22_V) each month (+120.82 MWh Jan-2026, +26.73 MWh Feb-2026). Excel is immutable.

Excel lists B315.KV1_VMM21_V as both a +term on row 30 (B314) AND the sole +term on row 31 (B315). Ontology attached the meter to B315 (prefix-match convention). Result: B311 over- counts by +23.72 Jan / +15.22 Feb (via the pool share), and B314 under-counts by the same magnitude. B315 itself matches Excel exactly. Excel is immutable.
Device swap 2025-01-09 (last value 5386.99). Split A|B via rolling_sum.
Device swap 2025-10-17 (last value 799.85). Outside Jan/Feb 2026 reference period.
Counter went offline 2025-10-17 at value 236425.72. Leaf meter; no children for sum-patch. Outside Jan/Feb 2026 reference.

Counter went offline 2026-01-14 at value 278.83. Inside the Jan 2026 reference period — affects Jan 14 → Feb 28. Ref carries valid_to so downstream gets zero delta post-outage (flat-carry equivalent). Excel total not materially impacted (B301 is a small consumer).

B311.KV1_VMM26 is the main kallvatten distribution node with 13 children. Currently healthy; candidate for sum-children patch if it ever goes offline.
